headline: How DuPont’s Reverse Stock Split Approval And Reaffirmed Guidance At DuPont de Nemours (DD) Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: At its 21 May 2026 AGM, DuPont de Nemours approved an amendment to enable a reverse stock split of between 1-for-2 and 1-for-4, alongside a proportional reduction in authorized common shares, while also reaffirming its second-quarter and full-year 2026 net sales and earnings guidance. This combination of a capital structure change and confirmed financial targets raises questions about how DuPont balances shareholder structure with operational expectations. We’ll now examine how the approved...
